test.notes: swell-memory: 380 tests passed, swell-core: 170 tests passed

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider documenting trait extension policy: when to extend traits vs adding methods directly to implementations. The current pattern (SqliteKnowledgeGraph has more methods than KnowledgeGraph trait) is consistent but could lead to abstraction leaks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both knowledge-graph and memory store follow the pattern of implementation having more methods than trait defines
